title: Bengaluru court castigates investigation officer of Lokayukta police and assessing officials for ‘serious lapses and misleading reports’ in corruption case
description: The court found that V. Muniyappa, a former Managing Director of the Karnataka Council for Technological Upgradation, had accumulated disproportionate assets worth ₹4.13 crore — a staggering 170% above his legitimate income — during the check period from December 9, 1982, to July 15, 2014.
